SELECTED PROJECTS
Credit Card Fraud Detection
Jan 2026 – Mar 2026
Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM, SMOTE, SHAP, MLflow, FastAPI, Streamlit, Hugging Face Spaces  |  GitHub | Live
• Constructed a live, end-to-end ML pipeline catching fraud across 284,807 transactions without blocking real customers.
• Compared 6 models and tuned XGBoost to 0.9779 AUC-ROC, the strongest of the set.
• Calibrated the alert threshold to flag just 8 false alarms across 56,864 real transactions at 90.7% precision.
• Applied SMOTE to the training data only, correcting the severe 0.17% fraud imbalance without leaking test data.
• Served a plain-English SHAP explanation with each prediction, showing the top 5 drivers behind every fraud flag.
DemandIQ: Retail Demand Forecasting
Mar 2026 – May 2026
Python, Pandas, NumPy, statsmodels, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch, Prophet, SARIMA, MLflow, Streamlit, Plotly  |  GitHub | Live
• Built a demand-forecasting system across 500 store-item series to help retailers right-size inventory.
• Benchmarked 5 forecasting models (Prophet, SARIMA, XGBoost, LSTM) and cut forecast error 18.7% below baseline.
• Implemented step-by-step forecasting that predicts one day at a time, mirroring how the model runs in production.
• Engineered 16 time-series features (holidays, weekly lags, rolling averages) designed to avoid peeking at future data.
• Projected $655K in annual inventory savings by running forecast gains through an overstock/stockout cost model.
MLOps Support-Ticket Classifier
Dec 2025 – Jan 2026
Python, Scikit-learn, MLflow, FastAPI, Docker, Docker Compose, Prometheus, Grafana, GitHub Actions, Streamlit  |  GitHub | Live
• Productionized a ticket-routing system that replaces slow manual triage, sorting into 5 categories at 82.5% accuracy.
• Launched the model as a web API serving up to 100 tickets per request, each with a confidence score.
• Wired an automatic gate that promotes a challenger only when it beats the live model’s 0.82 F1.
• Instrumented the service with Prometheus and Grafana, tracking speed, errors, and drift every 15 seconds.
• Containerized 4 services (API, MLflow, Prometheus, Grafana) into one Docker stack run with a single command.
Hospital Patient-Experience Analytics
Apr 2026 – Jun 2026
Python, SQL, PostgreSQL, psycopg, tenacity, gspread, pytest, testcontainers, Looker Studio  |  GitHub
• Designed a pipeline that turns 398K raw CMS API records into clear hospital rankings.
• Streamed a 325K-row survey file into a PostgreSQL database in just 28 seconds.
• Modeled a 0–100 patient-experience score from 8 survey areas, skipping hospitals with too little data.
• Verified the score against official CMS star ratings and found they closely agree (r ≈ 0.52).
• Embedded 17 automated tests that spin up a real database to prove the pipeline stays reliable.
